narrative:
Weathersfield Twp C (precinct in Trumbull County) has 375 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 12.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 29.3%, a pronounced Democratic lean of 17.1 percentage points.
